mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lottery_coupon_strategy ORDER BY is_fallback ASC, CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN update_time END DESC, category ASC, coupon_type ASC
SELECT * FROM lottery_coupon_strategy WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY is_fallback ASC, roi_score DESC
SELECT * FROM lottery_coupon_strategy WHERE is_fallback = 1 AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lottery_coupon_strategy (strategy_id, coupon_id, category, coupon_type, coupon_value, min_order_amount, avg_order_price, category_margin, order_count_30d, user_count_30d, repeat_buy_rate, elasticity_score, conversion_lift, volume_lift, actual_discount, net_profit_rate, roi_score, break_even_discount, recommend_reason, status, is_fallback) VALUES (#{strategyId}, #{couponId}, #{category}, #{couponType}, #{couponValue}, #{minOrderAmount}, #{avgOrderPrice}, #{categoryMargin}, #{orderCount30d}, #{userCount30d}, #{repeatBuyRate}, #{elasticityScore}, #{conversionLift}, #{volumeLift}, #{actualDiscount}, #{netProfitRate}, #{roiScore}, #{breakEvenDiscount}, #{recommendReason}, #{status}, #{isFallback})
mapper.update: UPDATE lottery_coupon_strategy SET avg_order_price = #{avgOrderPrice}, order_count_30d = #{orderCount30d}, user_count_30d = #{userCount30d}, repeat_buy_rate = #{repeatBuyRate}, elasticity_score = #{elasticityScore}, conversion_lift = #{conversionLift}, volume_lift = #{volumeLift}, actual_discount = #{actualDiscount}, net_profit_rate = #{netProfitRate}, roi_score = #{roiScore}, break_even_discount = #{breakEvenDiscount}, recommend_reason = #{recommendReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
